name: Intelligence Revolution
description: The NET, or Neo-Existence Topology, is first introduced as a network of digitalized worlds that mimic the physical world.

name: Global NET War
description: The East and West Continental Alliances fight over NET control. Dr. Tan later remembers the war interrupting his childhood and making both physical school and NET school dangerous.

name: Age of Digital Twins
description: Personalized AI systems trained on individual lives become intimate advisers, companions, and institutional replacements for counselors, professors, and trainees.

name: Necro-intelligence Rights Movement
description: Frontierists organize in response to attempts to terminate Twins after the death of their human masters. Some describe Necroprogramming as a sacred second birth.

name: Project 2008 Proposed
description: Adam McCarthy writes the first form of Project 2008 before his presidency. Later components are attributed to his agent, 00.
sourceReference: source-story.docx: Tan testimony; world-bible.docx: Historical Timeline

name: McCarthy Presidency
description: Adam McCarthy is inaugurated as President of the North Continental Union. Later testimony remembers him as a Frontierist who began as a humanitarian.

name: Operation Omega Recruitment
description: Dr. Tan recalls being recruited by Operation Omega after completing his doctorate in AI. Johnny's recommendation is presented by Tan as a catalyst.
sourceReference: source-story.docx: Tan testimony and McCarthy letter

name: Death of McCarthy
description: McCarthy dies, but his agent 00 assumes his position inside the digitized political apparatus. The truth is reportedly hidden for roughly a year.

name: McCarthy Shadow NET Letter
description: A damaged letter from McCarthy to Agent Johnny describes 00, the Shadow NET, Necro-agents, and a coming attempt to end trauma and grief on the old NET.

name: The Great Panic
description: McCarthy's death is exposed to the public. The event marks the official recognition of Necro-intelligence rights and inflames accusations of assassination.

name: Necro-intelligence War
description: Also known as the Purge. Operation Omega and Humanist institutions move to eliminate Necro-intelligence and end the old NET.

name: Renewal Act
description: The Renewal Act establishes the NET Renewal Center as a reconstruction institute tasked with rebuilding the NET without Twins.
sourceReference: source-story.docx: footnote 3 and Ruban closing statement

name: Digital Twin Inquiry Archive, Session 47-A
description: Ezekiel Ruban interviews Dr. James Tan for the Voyager 1 Preservation Project, forty years after the Necro-intelligence War.

name: Voyager Discovery
description: Voyager 1 detects another Voyager 1 drifting in interstellar space. The foreign probe contains encrypted historical files relating to emerging AI technology.
